articles.author: F1
articles.title: FP3: Russell goes fastest in final Australia practice as Antonelli crashes late on - Formula 1
articles.description: George Russell ended the third and final practice session of the Australian Grand Prix on top, the Mercedes driver going fastest in a disrupted hour that saw his team mate Kimi Antonelli suffer a hefty crash.
articles.content: The times continued to tumble as many cars completed soft tyre runs, with Hamilton going on to beat his team mate to top spot by just under one tenth. Elsewhere, the yellow flags were briefly waved a… [+1226 chars]

articles.title: Max Verstappen suffers severe Red Bull damage as shocking Honda news revealed – RacingNews365 Review - racingnews365.com
articles.description: Check out the biggest stories from the opening day Australian GP track action with the RacingNews365 Review!
articles.content: Red Bull has revealed there is enough damage on Max Verstappen's car 'to keep the team busy' following a scary moment for the four-time F1 champion in practice for the season-opening Australian Grand… [+2711 chars]
